instructions: Immediately notify the nearest usher or security guard.
Provide a detailed description of the child (age, clothing, last seen location).
Wait at the exact location where you lost sight of them.
Security will initiate a sector-wide lockdown until the child is located.
Do not move the individual unless they are in immediate danger.
Alert an usher or use the FlowTwin app emergency button.
State the exact section, row, and seat number.
First aid response team targets a 3-minute arrival.
All main gates (A, B) have dedicated accessible entry lanes.
Wheelchair escorts are available upon request at entry.
policies.contactLocation: ADA Assistance Kiosk at Gate A
